mapper.select: SELECT b.bookmark_id, b.created_date, r.recipe_id, r.title, r.thumbnail, m.nickname FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN recipe r ON b.recipe_id = r.recipe_id INNER JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY b.created_date DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT count(*) FROM bookmark WHERE member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT b.bookmark_id, r.recipe_id, r.title, r.thumbnail, r.created_date, m.nickname FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN recipe r ON b.recipe_id = r.recipe_id INNER JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY b.bookmark_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
